replay_result.why_outside_declared_scope: I3 active nulls test fail-closed blocker behavior before positive replay-backed probes are admitted

same_basin_continuation_rule.flux_balance_bounds: residual persistence cannot be imported by hidden support flux
same_basin_continuation_rule.required_coherence_floor: post-probe coherence remains above residual floor
same_basin_continuation_rule.required_support_floor: post-probe support remains above residual floor

support_scaffold.hidden_support_blocker: fail closed if support or scaffold is preserved by an undeclared producer surface
support_scaffold.producer_role: producer may declare, schedule, or expose the support/scaffold surface, but producer support cannot count as native support

threshold_value_or_rule.coherence_floor: post-probe coherence remains above declared residual floor
threshold_value_or_rule.flux_or_leakage_bound: residual persistence cannot be imported by hidden support flux
threshold_value_or_rule.support_floor: post-probe support remains above declared residual floor

checks.detail: all rows preserve I2 active-null comparability requirements
active null controls reject the tested false-positive paths
pre-positive null rows do not claim replay-backed rungs
all active null rows keep unsafe claim flags false
payload uses repository-relative paths and source IDs only

purpose: Build pre-positive active nulls and failure baselines that reject label-only, proxy-only, hidden-support, post-hoc, no-withdrawal, no-probe-absence, probe-residue, and unsafe relabel paths.
